context.usage: Displays happiness as filled segments along bottom row.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 384x1px (3 states × 128x1) with 0px spacing.
Bar is aligned to the bottom row (y=127) and uses 16 segments of 8px each.
Full state uses #FF004D fill; empty state uses #C2C3C7; separators use #1D2B53 1px markers every 8px.
shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale on the 128x128 playfield.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering keeps the interface crisp without hiding gameplay.
differences: This HUD asset conveys happiness in one quick glance at the lower edge.
The bar footprint stays narrow so it preserves playfield visibility.
Color progression must remain readable without text support.

reference_images.label: cockatiel_reference_photo
reference_images.purpose: Grounds pet-context icon meaning so UI feedback matches Echo care actions.

reference_images.label: pico_8_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds tiny handheld-style HUD layout and menu density.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds crisp low-resolution glyphs, icon silhouettes, and flat UI shading.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle or SpriteSheetBundle with a fixed-step atlas timer for animated UI indicators.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and expose handles through a UI resource keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Anchor all UI nodes to whole pixels inside the 128x128 safe area.
Preserve nearest-neighbor filtering for every icon, font atlas, and bar segment.
Use visibility toggles or timer-driven atlas index changes instead of replacing textures at runtime.
